name: VEX Protocol
description: The trust layer for AI agents. Adversarial verification, temporal memory, and cryptographic proofs for production-grade AI.

VEX_PORT.description: The port the VEX server will bind to

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API Key (optional if using other providers)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API Key (optional if using other providers)

DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.description: DeepSeek API Key (optional if using other providers)

MISTRAL_API_KEY.description: Mistral API Key (optional if using other providers)
